description: The Rebel General and his pyrotechnicians have drawn from all the rhythms of Congo since their debut to reveal their superpowers–rock and funk, ready for any union and every invitation. They have even conquered Latin America and joyfully reinvented the triangular trade of sounds. It's obvious for someone who, from his very first record, proclaimed, "Ich bin ein Congolese, The World is my land". "We all have ancestors in Africa", Jupiter reminds us, "who also practiced music. And if Africa resembles a revolver, its trigger is found... in Congo". From Kinshasa, Jupiter and his merry men give the signal–a new journey around the world awaits.
subtitle: Democratic Republic of the Congo
title: Jupiter & Okwess Concert
